stages.name: Create Issue
stages.description: Create a GitHub issue with proper template
validations: issue_number must be a positive integer
issue_url must be a valid GitHub URL

stages.name: Write Change Plan
stages.description: Post a structured change plan as issue comment
validations: change_plan_comment_url must be a valid URL
files_to_modify must be a non-empty list

stages.name: Create Branch & Implement
stages.description: Create feature branch and implement changes
validations: commit_shas must be a non-empty list

stages.name: Update Documentation
stages.description: Update relevant docs, specs, or ADRs
validations: docs_updated must be a non-empty list of file paths

stages.name: Update Changelog
validations: changelog_entry must be a non-empty string

stages.name: Submit PR
stages.description: Push branch and open a pull request linking the issue
validations: pr_number must be a positive integer
pr_url must be a valid GitHub URL
